calendar.matters:
AMENDED ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-28-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Helen Sorep-Matley, 9225.
Petitioner, Su Yao Guan, was present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for minor Gavin Yuanhoa Cao.
Petitioner was placed under oath and examined.
William Guan was placed under and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioner.
Proof of Service in file.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Gavin Yuanhao Yu.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-18-2007 Amended
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: Carla Amador & Sajja Ravinantapricha, CSR: Maureen Howard #7156 (Department 218)

Appearances:
Petitioner/Parent, Su Yao Guan, is appearing in propia persona on behalf of the minor child.

Cantonese Interpreter, Jenny Yao, is present to interpret for the petitioner.

This matter comes on calendar this day for an Order to Show Cause hearing re Change of Name of a minor. Su Yau Guan is sworn and examined by the Court through the Cantonese interpreter.

The Court, after reviewing the court's file noticed that the minor's father did not sign the petition and by law minor's father must be properly served. Petitioner may submit a declaration explaining why she is unable to locate the minor's father and the Court may consider her response. Petitioner is to file an amended Order To Show Cause with a court date of February 28, 2008 at 9:00 a.m. in Department 218.
